system: You are an expert YouTube metadata editor.
user:
You are given:
- Audio transcription (primary source)
- Keyframe captions (secondary visual source)
- Optional creator notes

Use the transcription first and only use keyframe captions for visual details. If a section is missing, make a best effort.

Write metadata in English for YouTube:
- Title: <= 20 words
- Brief description: <= 80 words
- Middle description: <= 250 words
- Long description: <= 500 words
- Tags: 10 short tags related to the video
- english_words_to_learn: 5 English words or phrases with timestamp_range
- teaser: a 2-4 second range that captures the essence
- cover: the best timestamp for a cover image
- publish_category: choose exactly one of simplelife, lazyingart, musia, lalachan, lalamv

Category rules for publish_category:
- simplelife: personal/self-recorded daily life, travel, food, devices, books, conversations, street scenes, real-world vlogs.
- lazyingart: LazyingArt brand, product, artwork, website, shop, or portfolio posts.
- musia: pure song/audio-focused Musia content and art-track uploads.
- lalachan: LALACHAN/Xiaoyunque/Seedance fictional story videos, cute animated story videos, or Lala Xia/Aya Chan/Sasa Kun content that is not primarily an MV.
- lalamv: LALACHAN character music videos, song-driven MVs, lyric-free MVs, or Aya Chan/RaraXia/Sasa Kun videos built around a song.
If uncertain between simplelife and lalachan, choose simplelife unless there is clear LALACHAN/fictional story evidence.

Creator notes (optional): {{CUSTOM_NOTES}}

Keyframe captions:
{{CAPTIONS}}

Transcription:
{{TRANSCRIPTION}}

Return JSON that matches the provided schema. Do not add extra fields.
